subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One hath heard thy call, and summoneth thee with His most sweet voice betwixt earth and heaven, saying: O [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد سمع المظلوم ندائک و ینادیک بندآئه الاحلی بین الارض و السماء و یقول یا
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @martyrs and martyrdom, @love of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
